rootCause: Each tab mutated an in-memory snapshot loaded at tab start, so later writes could overwrite earlier tab changes when both tabs operated on stale game state.
resolution: Game state now stores a checksum alongside persisted state and mutating helpers re-sync from persisted storage when checksums diverge. Buy/sell, quest, and process flows now refresh before writes, and item/process/quest UIs poll for checksum-driven updates to keep cross-tab state (including dUSD) current.
